title: vernonia arborea var. javanica
intro: Vernonia arborea var. javanica, also known as Java ironweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a tall herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Vernonia arborea var. javanica can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
